description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular metallic body with a brushed steel finish, giving it a modern and industrial appearance. At the center, a raised monitor displays a warning message and a stylized face, suggesting a digital interface. Below the monitor, a full-sized keyboard and a separate numeric keypad are integrated into a recessed black panel, providing tactile input options. The left side of the register includes a colored button panel, likely for power or function selection, while the right side is marked with the word 'Airgetlám.' The overall structure is boxy and solid, with ample space beneath the main surface, possibly for legroom or storage. The design suggests durability and security, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as retail stores or kiosks.
description: A sturdy, metallic cash register with a digital display, full keyboard, and colored side panel, finished in brushed steel. The design is modern, angular, and built for durability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the monitor with a warning message, full keyboard, and colored button panel on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the register and the protruding monitor and keyboard assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a solid, unadorned metallic back with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the 'Airgetlám' text and the side profile of the monitor and keyboard.
attribute_keypad_layout: full QWERTY keyboard with separate numeric keypad and function keys
